included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Kodaikanal & Scenic Views
itinerary.description: Arrive in the princess of hill stations, Kodaikanal. Walk along the edge of Coaker's Walk and enjoy a relaxing boat cruise on Kodaikanal Lake.

itinerary.title: Pillar Rocks & Coracle Ride at Hogenakkal Falls
itinerary.description: See Kodaikanal's famous Pillar Rocks. Drive down the hills to Hogenakkal and experience a thrilling coracle boat ride below the roaring Kaveri River falls.

itinerary.title: Mysore Palace & Brindavan Musical Fountains
itinerary.description: Travel to Mysore. Tour the grand Mysore Palace, visit the sacred Chamundi Temple, and witness the spectacular evening fountain show at Brindavan Gardens.

itinerary.title: Adventure Day at Wonderla Theme Park & Departure
itinerary.description: Spend a full day of high-thrill amusement at Wonderla, trying the fast waterslides and high-speed coasters before concluding your tour.

title: Kodaikanal, Hogenakkal & Mysore: Lakes, Falls & Palaces
description: A beautiful tour linking Kodaikanal's hill-station charm, the raw power of Hogenakkal Falls, royal palace heritage in Mysore, and the theme park rides of Wonderla. A complete family holiday package.
highlights: Enjoy boating on Kodaikanal Lake and tour Coaker's Walk
Experience a coracle boat ride at Hogenakkal Falls
Tour the illuminated Mysore Palace and Chamundi Hills
Enjoy a full day of thrilling rides at Wonderla Amusement Park
